description: A square graphic in the ICE color palette. The top is a red banner with white text in mixed serif and italic styling reading 'Face the Consequences' ('the' in italic). The main body has a solid blue background with a faint ICE/DHS seal watermark behind the text. A large white serif headline reads '18 U.S.C.' (United States Code). Below it is a list of four federal criminal statutes, each formatted as a section symbol and number in serif beside a bold uppercase white offense label and red-highlighted penalty: 'Sec. 111 ASSAULTING, IMPEDING OR OBSTRUCTING UP TO 20 YEARS IN PRISON + $250K IN FINES'; 'Sec. 2261A CYBERSTALKING UP TO 5 YEARS IN PRISON'; 'Sec. 875 ONLINE THREATENING UP TO 20 YEARS IN PRISON'; 'Sec. 119 DOXING UP TO 5 YEARS IN PRISON'. At the bottom center is the white DHS/ICE seal with the 'ICE' wordmark.
notable_text: Face the Consequences; 18 U.S.C.; Sec.111 Assaulting/Impeding/Obstructing up to 20 years + $250K; Sec.2261A Cyberstalking up to 5 years; Sec.875 Online Threatening up to 20 years; Sec.119 Doxing up to 5 years
